sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] < 100:
        print(f"id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary'][:4]}")

# Character position
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'B' and n['pixels'] == 40:
        print(f"Character: boundary={n['boundary']}")
    if n['color'] == 'c':
        print(f"Charcoal L: boundary={n['boundary']}")
    if n['color'] == 'Y' and n['pixels'] < 50:
        print(f"Yellow L: boundary={n['boundary']}")
    if n['color'] == 'Y' and n['pixels'] > 50:
        print(f"Yellow bar: pixels={n['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
